title: I am Mito!
overview: Most teenage boys have enough trouble just dealing with the pressures of school and dating, but 15-year-old Aoi Mitsukuni's life becomes exponentially more complicated when his mom returns from a long "business trip." He discovers that not only is his beautiful mother actually an alien, but she's the notorious Space Pirate Mito to boot! To make matters worse, the girl Aoi likes at school is actually a secret Galactic Patrol agent attempting to find and arrest his mother. No one ever said being a teenager in love was easy!

title: Call Me Mom!
overview: Aoi is in denial of the fact that his mom looks like a little kid and tries to avoid her. Meanwhile, Mito is determined to get him to acknowledge her as his mother.

title: Sabu and Shin
overview: Sabu and Shin decide to test Aoi’s powers. Meanwhile, a cute blonde girl transfers into Aoi’s class. Little does Aoi know she’s really a secret undercover agent for the Galactic Patrol!

title: Trouble at the Firefly Festival
overview: It’s the local Firefly Festival and Mito wants to go on a mother-son date, but Aoi would rather hang out with a certain blonde girl he has his eye on.

title: A Blushing New Romance?
overview: Mito tells Aoi the story of how she crash landed on Earth and fell in love with his father.

title: Love Gone Astray?
overview: The Nenga siblings decide to use Aoi in order to get to Mito, but will Mutsuki’s feelings for Aoi get in the way?

title: Courting Disaster
overview: The Galactic Patrol is heads to Earth to find and arrest Mito. Meanwhile back on Earth, Masatsuki carries out his own plans to capture Aoi and deliver him to Ranban.

title: Broken Heart
overview: With Aoi in his clutches, Ranban reveals the truth behind his connection to Mito. Meanwhile, against the pleas of her crew, Mito agrees to turn herself in exchange for Aoi's freedom.

title: Ranban and Mito
overview: Masatsuki discovers that his dream job in the Special Forces isn’t living up to his expectations. Meanwhile, Ranban confronts Mito about their shared history.

title: Disaster Revisited
overview: It’s an all-out battle in Amanohara as Ranban’s forces face off with Mito’s pirates. Meanwhile, Aoi is trying to reach his mom without being captured by the Nenga siblings.

title: Fear and Power!
overview: Tired of waiting, Ranban decides to spearhead the search for Aoi himself.

title: Our Seal
overview: Mito and Ranban face off and the true source of Ranban’s power is revealed.

title: Seize the Happy Ending!
overview: Ranban decides to destroy the Earth. Can Mito and Aoi stop him in time?

title: The Queen Has Risen!
overview: Aoi tries to come to terms with his new position as Queen of the Galaxy. Meanwhile a new threat is on the horizon that could lead to the destruction of the entire universe!

title: The Make-Believe Fog
overview: Kafuko wants Aoi to take her on a date in the mountains. As they journey through the woods, a thick sinister fog develops.

title: Mutsuki's Heart
overview: Mito and her crew race back to Earth to help Aoi against Hikari. Meanwhile, Aoi sneaks off by herself to find out what’s really going on.

title: Tears and Flower Petals
overview: Mutsuki is struggling with her role as Aoi’s bodyguard. Will Mito and the others allow her to resign her post?

title: The Galactic War Begins
overview: Hikari kidnaps Mutsuki and uses her to taunt Aoi. In order to rescue Mutsuki, Aoi reluctantly goes to war with Hikari.

title: Suffering and Joy
overview: When Aoi refuses to give Hikari the Dainagon, Hakari resorts to her trump card - Mutsuki’s life!

title: Love and War
overview: Kafuko and the others continue to stage guerrilla warfare on the occupying army. Meanwhile Ranban tells Aoi of the legend of the First Queen.

title: The Lonely Queen
overview: Ranban is training Aoi, but is he pushing Aoi a little too hard? Meanwhile, Mito and the others continue their search for the Mirror.

title: Looming Distress
overview: Ranban continues to search for a way to escape Hikari’s shield. When an opening is finally discovered, is it really just another of Hikari’s traps?

title: Everyone With Mito!
overview: Mito launches an all out assault against Hikari’s fortress, but Aoi believes there has to be a better way. When Ranban reveals another way, will Aoi have the courage to try it?

title: The Last Promise
overview: Hikari attempts to change Aoi back into a male. Meanwhile Mito and Ranban finally learn the reason why the townspeople are being forced to blow the conches.

title: Fallen Destiny
overview: The day of the wedding has arrived, but will Hikari keep her promise? And even if she doesn’t, what choice does Aoi have?

title: A Final Goodbye
overview: Hikari and Aoi continue their battle in other dimensions. Meanwhile, the battle between Hikari’s forces and Aoi’s forces rages on back on Earth.
